description_long: This is a modern swivel chair featuring a high, segmented backrest and a plush, contoured seat, both upholstered in black leather or leather-like material. The chair's sides and lower exterior are encased in a rich, dark wood veneer, adding a touch of sophistication and warmth. The base consists of a sturdy, black metal star-shaped support with five legs, providing stability and allowing for smooth rotation. The armrests are integrated into the wooden side panels and are gently curved for ergonomic comfort. A visible adjustment lever is present on one side, suggesting height or tilt adjustability. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for office or executive settings in urban environments.
description: A high-back, black leather swivel chair with dark wood side panels, integrated armrests, and a five-legged black metal base. The chair exudes a modern, executive style with visible adjustment features.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tall, segmented black backrest and the dark wood panel wrapping around the lower back and sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's thick cushioning, wood paneling, and a visible adjustment lever beneath the armrest.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the contoured seat, segmented backrest, integrated armrests, and the star-shaped black metal base.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the seat and backrest, with wood paneling and no visible adjustment lever.
attribute_central_support_column: A black, metal, cylindrical central support column with a star-shaped five-legged base; appears fixed and robust.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, segmented, and contoured backrest upholstered in black leather, divided into three cushioned sections for ergonomic support.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated armrests formed by the curved wooden side panels, padded on top for comfort and seamlessly attached to the chair body.
